hero.title: LuxDrape Trade Program
hero.subtitle: Join thousands of interior designers, decorators, and contractors who trust LuxDrape for premium custom window treatments. Exclusive pricing, dedicated support, and priority service.

benefitsSection.title: Trade Member Benefits
benefitsSection.subtitle: Everything you need to deliver exceptional results for your clients

benefits.title: Trade Pricing
benefits.description: Exclusive discounts and automatic tax exemptions on every order. No minimum purchase required.

benefits.title: Fast Delivery
benefits.description: Our streamlined production ensures industry-leading delivery to your door in just 7 to 14 days.

benefits.title: Free Samples
benefits.description: Unlimited free swatches and even finished product samples to find the perfect fit for your project.

benefits.title: Expert Support
benefits.description: Get direct access to dedicated specialists for technical measurements and professional consultations.

qualificationsSection.title: Who Can Join?
qualificationsSection.subtitle: Our trade program is designed for professionals in the design and construction industry. If you purchase window treatments for clients or projects, you qualify.

testimonialsSection.title: What Trade Members Say
testimonialsSection.subtitle: Trusted by professionals across the country

testimonials.quote: Sourcing custom window treatments requires a balance of logic and aesthetics. We prioritize high-ticket quality that maintains professional margins for every project.
testimonials.author: Design Professionals

testimonials.quote: From complex measurements to technical specifications, our trade program is built to support the rigorous demands of architects and interior firms.
testimonials.author: Technical Support

testimonials.quote: Efficiency is the backbone of a successful project. We ensure a streamlined production process that delivers premium drapes within industry-leading windows.
testimonials.author: Operational Excellence

applicationSection.title: Apply for Trade Access
applicationSection.subtitle: Complete the form below. We'll review your application and respond within 2 business days.
applicationSection.successMessage: Application submitted! We'll review and respond within 2 business days.
applicationSection.legal: By submitting, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

faqTeaser.title: Questions?
faqTeaser.subtitle: Our trade team is here to help. Reach out for personalized assistance with your application or any questions about the program.
